title: Genomics research: world survey of public funding.
author: Pohlhaus JR Cook-Deegan RM
content:
S-EPMC2576262 PMC2576262 Genomics research: world survey of public funding.

Background

Over the past two decades, genomics has evolved as a scientific research discipline. Genomics research was fueled initially by government and nonprofit funding sources, later augmented by private research
